findings.evidence: Line 110 declares `lemma IsEffective.coeff_eq_zero_of_notMem_support {D : WeilDivisor X} (_ : IsEffective D) ...`; line 112 proves it only with `Finsupp.notMem_support_iff.mp hx`.
findings.fix: Remove the `IsEffective` hypothesis and either move/rename the lemma outside the `IsEffective` namespace or state it as a general `coeff_eq_zero_of_notMem_support` lemma.
findings.issue: `IsEffective.coeff_eq_zero_of_notMem_support` takes an unused `IsEffective D` hypothesis even though support membership alone proves the coefficient is zero.

summary: The new positivity proofs are mostly robust, but one added support lemma has a redundant effectivity hypothesis that makes the API misleading.
